scripts.build:wasm: cd .. && swift package --swift-sdk swift-6.2.4-RELEASE_wasm js --product HelloWorld && swift package --swift-sdk swift-6.2.4-RELEASE_wasm js --product TextStyles && swift package --swift-sdk swift-6.2.4-RELEASE_wasm js --product Buttons && swift package --swift-sdk swift-6.2.4-RELEASE_wasm js --product StateDemo && swift package --swift-sdk swift-6.2.4-RELEASE_wasm js --product Layout
